Dead positional parser removed (#1389). Note rows are decoded through notebooklm._row_adapters.notes.NoteRow; the classmethod had no production callers (only test_types.py exercised it). Construct Note(...) directly from NoteRow's named properties — see NotesAPI._parse_note.
Same break as notebooklm.Note.from_api_response above; this entry covers the audit's dotted-module-path view of the same callable.

v0.5.0 removed an unused raw RPC enum member that is not exercised by any client API.
v0.5.0 moved the streamed-chat endpoint path out of RPCMethod because it is an endpoint URL path, not a batchexecute RPC method; use notebooklm.rpc.get_query_url().

v0.5.0 DeprecationWarning cycle completed in v0.6.0: kwarg 'source_path' was removed from the public escape-hatch wrapper. Internal-only kwargs '_is_retry' and 'operation_variant' were removed alongside but are not audit-visible (underscored). Default-shape callers (client.rpc_call(method, params)) see no behavior change since the canonical defaults still flow through RpcExecutor.rpc_call. See docs/deprecations.md 'Removed in v0.6.0' and CHANGELOG.md [0.6.0] for migration.
Same break as notebooklm.NotebookLMClient.rpc_call above; this entry covers the audit's dotted-module-path view of the same callable.

v0.5.0 DeprecationWarning cycle completed: the deprecated 'poll_interval' alias was removed; use 'initial_interval' (same cadence). Passing 'poll_interval' now raises TypeError. See docs/deprecations.md 'Removed in v0.7.0' and CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased].
Same break as notebooklm.NotebookLMClient.artifacts.wait_for_completion above; this entry covers the audit's dotted-module-path view of the same callable.

v0.5.0 DeprecationWarning cycle completed: the positional-wait compatibility shim (*legacy_wait_args) was removed and 'wait'/'wait_timeout' are now keyword-only. Default-shape callers are unaffected; positional wait callers must switch to wait=/wait_timeout=. See docs/deprecations.md 'Removed in v0.7.0' and CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased].
Same break as notebooklm.NotebookLMClient.sources.add_url above; this entry covers the audit's dotted-module-path view of the same callable.

v0.5.0 DeprecationWarning cycle completed: the positional-wait compatibility shim (*legacy_wait_args) was removed and 'wait'/'wait_timeout' are now keyword-only. The functional 'mime_type' parameter is retained (it sets the upload content-type). Default-shape callers are unaffected; positional wait callers must switch to wait=/wait_timeout=. See docs/deprecations.md 'Removed in v0.7.0' and CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased].
Same break as notebooklm.NotebookLMClient.sources.add_file above; this entry covers the audit's dotted-module-path view of the same callable.

v0.5.0 DeprecationWarning cycle completed: the positional-wait compatibility shim (*legacy_wait_args) was removed and 'wait'/'wait_timeout' are now keyword-only. The 'mime_type' positional parameter (Drive document MIME type) is retained. Default-shape callers are unaffected; positional wait callers must switch to wait=/wait_timeout=. See docs/deprecations.md 'Removed in v0.7.0' and CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased].
Same break as notebooklm.NotebookLMClient.sources.add_drive above; this entry covers the audit's dotted-module-path view of the same callable.

v0.5.0 DeprecationWarning cycle completed (two MINOR cycles: 0.5.0 and 0.6.0); the deprecated NotesAPI.create_from_chat forwarder was removed. Replacement is client.chat.save_answer_as_note(...), the canonical citation-rich saved-from-chat method and data owner (ADR-0013). Behavior is identical; only the call site moves. See docs/deprecations.md 'Removed in v0.7.0' and CHANGELOG.md.
Same break as notebooklm.NotebookLMClient.notes.create_from_chat above; this entry covers the audit's dotted-module-path view of the same callable.

v0.7.0 #1209: now returns the typed MindMapResult dataclass instead of dict[str, Any]. MappingCompatMixin preserves dict-subscript access (warned, dropped in v0.8.0). See CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] 'Added' and docs/deprecations.md.

v0.7.0 #1209: now returns the typed ResearchStart dataclass instead of dict[str, Any] (MappingCompatMixin preserved dict-subscript access, dropped in v0.8.0). v0.8.0 #1342: the return type narrows from ResearchStart | None to ResearchStart — a 'couldn't-start' payload (empty/non-list or falsey task_id) now raises DecodingError instead of returning None. See CHANGELOG.md and docs/deprecations.md.
Same break as notebooklm.NotebookLMClient.research.start above; this entry covers the audit's dotted-module-path view of the same callable.

v0.8.0 #1290: the uninformative always-True return becomes None; the -> bool annotation is dropped. Any failure raises before the return, so the bool carried no information. See CHANGELOG.md and docs/deprecations.md.

v0.7.0 #1247: rename() now re-fetches and returns the renamed Artifact | None (previously returned None even on success, an unusable return). Bulk opt-out via return_object=False. See CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] 'rename() returns the renamed object'.
Same break as notebooklm.NotebookLMClient.artifacts.rename above; this entry covers the audit's dotted-module-path view of the same callable.

v0.7.0 #1247: rename() return annotation widened from Source to Source | None to match the missing-strict reads/renames contract. Bulk opt-out via return_object=False. See CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] 'rename() returns the renamed object'.
Same break as notebooklm.NotebookLMClient.sources.rename above; this entry covers the audit's dotted-module-path view of the same callable.

v0.8.0 #1247: get() now raises SourceNotFoundError on a miss instead of returning None; the return annotation narrows from 'notebooklm.types.Source | None' to 'notebooklm.types.Source' (matches notebooks.get). Use get_or_none() for the None-on-miss lookup. See CHANGELOG.md and docs/deprecations.md.
